_comment: Alice (born 1966) retires at 60 and moves to Australia in 2026. She holds a single AUD super account worth $1,000,000 AUD growing at 7%/yr. Inflation is zeroed so amounts stay round. Annual expenses $50,000. Tests verify: (1) AU fund earnings tax (15%) is deducted from the account balance each year, (2) AU super withdrawals at age 60+ are completely tax-free (auTax === 0), (3) US treatment of super withdrawal is taxable as ordinary income.
